value.found_quote: Claude Code uses a tiered permission system to balance power and safety:
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a tiered permission system that classifies tools by approval requirements, governs tool use via allow/ask/deny rules evaluated in deny-then-ask-then-allow order, and balances power and safety. Supporting quotes include "Rules are evaluated in order: deny, then ask, then allow" and the descriptions of Allow, Ask, and Deny rules.
